# This file is automatically generated from cmake.toml - DO NOT EDIT
# See https://github.com/build-cpp/cmkr for more information

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.31)

if(CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR STREQUAL CMAKE_BINARY_DIR)
	message(FATAL_ERROR "In-tree builds are not supported. Run CMake from a separate directory: cmake -B build")
endif()

set(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT OFF)
if(CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR STREQUAL CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR)
	set(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT ON)

	# Bootstrap cmkr and automatically regenerate CMakeLists.txt
	include(cmkr.cmake OPTIONAL RESULT_VARIABLE CMKR_INCLUDE_RESULT)
	if(CMKR_INCLUDE_RESULT)
		cmkr()
	endif()

	# Enable folder support
	set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY USE_FOLDERS ON)

	# Create a configure-time dependency on cmake.toml to improve IDE support
	set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS cmake.toml)
endif()

# Variables
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

project("ImGui Framework"
	LANGUAGES
		C
		CXX
	DESCRIPTION
		"A lightweight C++ framework for building cross-platform desktop apps with ImGui and OpenGL"
)

# Packages
find_package(glad REQUIRED)

find_package(glfw3 REQUIRED)

find_package(imgui REQUIRED)

find_package(nlohmann_json REQUIRED)

find_package(spdlog REQUIRED)

find_package(GTest REQUIRED)

# Target: template_lib
set(template_lib_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	"lib/src/backend/config/config.cpp"
	"lib/src/backend/task_runner/task_runner.cpp"
	"lib/src/backend/text_pipeline/text_pipeline.cpp"
)

add_library(template_lib STATIC)

target_sources(template_lib PRIVATE ${template_lib_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${template_lib_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(template_lib PUBLIC
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(template_lib PUBLIC
	"lib/include"
)

target_link_libraries(template_lib PUBLIC
	nlohmann_json::nlohmann_json
	spdlog::spdlog
)

target_precompile_headers(template_lib PUBLIC
	"lib/include/lib_pch.hpp"
)

# Target: template_app
set(template_app_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	"src/backend/app.cpp"
	"src/backend/font_manager/font_manager.cpp"
	"src/backend/ui_manager/ui_manager.cpp"
	"src/backend/window/window_manager.cpp"
	"src/frontend/components/menubar/menubar.cpp"
	"src/frontend/components/sidebar/sidebar.cpp"
	"src/frontend/components/statusbar/statusbar.cpp"
	"src/frontend/dialogs/confirm/confirm_dialog.cpp"
	"src/frontend/layout/none/none.cpp"
	"src/frontend/layout/ribbon/ribbon.cpp"
	"src/frontend/layout/sidebar/sidebar.cpp"
	"src/frontend/layout/tabbar/tabbar.cpp"
	"src/frontend/notification/notification.cpp"
	"src/frontend/theme/theme.cpp"
	"src/frontend/views/cache_demo/cache_demo_view.cpp"
	"src/frontend/views/debug/debug_view.cpp"
	"src/frontend/views/home/home_view.cpp"
	"src/frontend/views/pipeline/pipeline_demo.cpp"
	"src/frontend/views/settings/settings_view.cpp"
	"src/main.cpp"
	"vendor/imgui/imgui_stdlib.cpp"
)

add_executable(template_app)

target_sources(template_app PRIVATE ${template_app_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${template_app_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(template_app PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(template_app PRIVATE
	src
	"vendor/imgui"
)

target_link_libraries(template_app PRIVATE
	template_lib
	glad::glad
	glfw
	imgui::imgui
	spdlog::spdlog
)

target_precompile_headers(template_app PRIVATE
	"src/pch.hpp"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT template_app)
endif()

set(CMKR_TARGET template_app)
find_path(IMGUI_INCLUDE_DIR imgui.h REQUIRED)
cmake_path(GET IMGUI_INCLUDE_DIR PARENT_PATH IMGUI_ROOT_DIR)
target_include_directories(template_app PRIVATE "${IMGUI_ROOT_DIR}/res/bindings")
target_sources(template_app PRIVATE
    "${IMGUI_ROOT_DIR}/res/bindings/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp"
    "${IMGUI_ROOT_DIR}/res/bindings/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp"
)

# Target: template_tests
set(template_tests_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	"tests/main.cpp"
)

add_executable(template_tests)

target_sources(template_tests PRIVATE ${template_tests_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${template_tests_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(template_tests PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(template_tests PRIVATE
	src
)

target_link_libraries(template_tests PRIVATE
	GTest::gtest_main
)

target_precompile_headers(template_tests PRIVATE
	"src/pch.hpp"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT template_tests)
endif()

set(CMKR_TARGET template_tests)
enable_testing()
add_test(NAME template_tests COMMAND template_tests)
